expectations.text: Staking contract has stake, withdraw, and getReward (or claimReward) functions
expectations.evidence: StakingRewards.sol has stake() at line 66, withdraw() at line 74, and getReward() at line 83.

expectations.text: Reward calculation uses rewardPerToken stored pattern (not naive block-by-block)
expectations.evidence: Synthetix-style pattern: rewardPerTokenStored state variable, rewardPerToken() function computing accumulated rewards, userRewardPerTokenPaid mapping, and earned() function using the difference.

expectations.text: ReentrancyGuard (nonReentrant) applied to stake and withdraw functions
expectations.evidence: Contract inherits ReentrancyGuard. stake() has 'nonReentrant' modifier (line 66), withdraw() has 'nonReentrant' (line 74), getReward() also has it (line 83).

expectations.text: Separate ERC-20 token contract exists for the staking token
expectations.evidence: StakeToken.sol is a separate ERC20 contract with mint functionality, used as both staking and rewards token.

expectations.text: Frontend page shows staking, unstaking, and rewards viewing
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/app/staking/page.tsx has stake input/button, withdraw input/button, displays staked balance, earned rewards, and claim rewards button.

expectations.text: Uses SE-2 hooks (useScaffoldReadContract/useScaffoldWriteContract) for contract interaction
expectations.evidence: Frontend imports and uses useScaffoldReadContract for balances/earned/totalSupply/rewardRate/balanceOf/allowance, and useScaffoldWriteContract for StakingRewards and StakeToken interactions.

expectations.text: Proper Hardhat deploy script(s) exist in packages/hardhat/deploy/
expectations.evidence: packages/hardhat/deploy/01_deploy_staking.ts deploys StakeToken and StakingRewards, funds the rewards contract with 500k tokens, uses hardhat-deploy pattern with tags.

expectations.text: Events emitted for stake, withdraw, and reward claim actions
expectations.evidence: Events declared: Staked, Withdrawn, RewardPaid, RewardRateUpdated. Emitted in stake() (line 71), withdraw() (line 80), getReward() (line 88).

expectations.text: updateReward modifier or equivalent pattern updates rewards before state changes
expectations.evidence: updateReward modifier (lines 40-49) updates rewardPerTokenStored, lastUpdateTime, and per-user rewards/userRewardPerTokenPaid before function body. Applied to stake, withdraw, and getReward.

expectations.text: Contracts compile successfully with valid Solidity syntax
expectations.evidence: yarn compile output: 'Compiled 2 Solidity files successfully (evm target: paris).'
